foods.name: Avocado

foods.note: High fat, slow for a fruit

foods.note: Processed nuts, similar to whole nuts

foods.note: Long grain, lower GI than short grain

foods.name: Seeds

foods.name: Snacks

foods.note: Soft soy curd, easy to digest

foods.name: Vinegar Apple
foods.note: Liquid, may slow gastric emptying of meal

combinationEffects.name: Fat With Protein
combinationEffects.note: Fat slows protein digestion by delaying gastric emptying

combinationEffects.name: Fiber With Carbs
combinationEffects.note: Soluble and insoluble fiber slow carbohydrate absorption

combinationEffects.name: Acid With Minerals
combinationEffects.note: Vitamin C enhances iron and calcium absorption speed

combinationEffects.name: Liquid With Solid
combinationEffects.note: Soups and stews digest faster than dry solid foods

combinationEffects.name: Spice With Meal
combinationEffects.note: Ginger, black pepper, and cumin enhance gastric motility

combinationEffects.name: Raw Vs Cooked
combinationEffects.note: Raw foods take longer to break down than cooked equivalents

combinationEffects.name: High Gimeal
combinationEffects.note: High glycemic meals empty stomach faster
